proposed_relations.description: Both records represent the same 125th Street SBS corridor in Manhattan. corridor_125th-st-manhattan has limits Morningside Avenue to Second Avenue; corridor_125th-street-manhattan has limits Amsterdam Avenue to Second Avenue. The one-block difference at the western end (Amsterdam vs Morningside) is a documentation-level boundary variation within the same SBS project corridor serving M60, M100, M101, Bx15.
